title: The trial of yet another thing.
content:
and then he said that what must one do in order to live a good life? Why must one attempt to please everyone around them? He looked up to the sky, grasping his chest, and claimed "I will live life for my own sake, and for the sake of The Lord, Jesus Christ"!


The night is heavy, and I find myself often contemplating things I never wished for.


I wonder what the future holds for me, whether it is a lovely interaction, or a succumbing trial, I look forward to all of it.


For to live is to experience, and to experience means to have went out there and given it your all.
